item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Dogs are treated better
item.description:
I don't understand. I'm sitting in this room right now, listening to my mother's death rattles. Soon, they say. Fuck. This has been a three-day ritual. We want to be here for her when my mom dies. She is finally succumbing to her Alzheimer's. I've spent two and a half years watching whatever was left of my mom disappear. Her memories of me and her beloved grandchild. She didn't remember who we were. She knew that she loved us. That's something. But the past three days have been either of her clutching at the sky in anxiety or fear or pain, or so drugged up that there can be no thoughts left. And I don't know. Maybe there's some of her left in there.
To imagine some consciousness left in her mind...some comprehension as she struggles on her last breaths of life. If any part of her is still in there, she would be scared out of her mind. At no point in the last year has she really had any idea of what was going on. What's the point of this? Dogs get a simple shot and that's it. There is zero percent chance of her ever coming back. Zero. Soon, they say. edit: Thank you, everyone. I don't have words right now.
item.dc:creator: DogsThatGoMoo

item.title: An Egyptian man taking a selfie with a 2000 years old Roman era portrait of an Egyptian man.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: The aptly named “Climate Spiral”. A cool little visualization from NASA.
item.description: I was actually researching Betelgeuse’s instability when I got distracted by NASA’s YouTube sites. I thought this was really creative and interesting, and there’s more to love here… https://m.youtube.com/@nasascientificvisualizatio5842
item.dc:creator: Firehoser

item.title: Images of Note: Have a Fungus
item.description:
Hey City Council, Linux Mint will save you so much money
LOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOONG
I am God's Mistake!
Square
This is a real church. No crack or horrific extremism happening here.
After the events of Frontier day, everyone under the age of 25 now has nightmares about Janeway, making things very awkward for her.
Yeah, just not Confederate Wizards
I remember saying "thank fuck 2019 is over" and then 2020 hit.
I still get carded at 33.
They wouldn't let him up there because that was where the Warner Brothers (and the Warner Sister) live.
The Prime Minister of the UK in the year 3004 is there trying to make people accept their deaths as to not disrupt the economy.
I don't even know where this is from but this is a vibe.
uwu
Yeah that's just me tbh
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Just wanted to share this embroidery piece I created
item.description: Edit: Woohoo! Most viral! Thanks for supporting my work once again, dear Imgurians! This and other creations are available here in my Etsy shop: https://rebordacaoembroidery.etsy.com Wishing you all a wonderful Sunday!
item.dc:creator: rebordacao

item.title: Time you enjoyed spending isn’t wasted
item.dc:creator: tanijrou

item.title: I’m only here for the memes, adhd style
item.description:
It’s me, I’m feral housewife
Do you ever start thinking and next thing you know you’ve hurt your own feelings?
I loved this picture so much I drew my own and printed a sticker.
He does his best, but my brain gets bored of Feelings.
Also the uterus gets blamed for a lot when really it’s the ovaries that are jerks. Unfortunately I still have those.
I swear memes just add themselves to these dumps. I don’t know where this came from but I’m leaving it.
Making spreadsheets is so relaxing. Making them pretty is a hobby.
Winnie is a weirdo but he sure is cute.
item.dc:creator: rjmmbc

item.title: Like a black fly.. in a blue chardonnay
item.dc:creator: Capinron

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greeting online friends
seems a tad excessive
it’s called a love-hate relationship, and yeah me too
if you can find that person, hold on
cereal kief gets you wasted
so sad
I’ve never even seen the show and I agree
I’m not going to tell you again
the best kind of busy
accurate
I think I posted this before. Welp, here it is again
finally
haha funny but easily Robin. never even tried a McRib
I cry at that point
wait what
I have absolutely zero idea what anything in this meme is talking about/referencing
delightful
that’s it for me. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.description: One of the first photos I saved, I believe the tradition is to share something old, because it might be new for you! #cakeday#somethingold#pun#illshowmyselfout. Edit: my first front page!

item.title: Take him to the park ASAP!
item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: Some programming humor for a niche audience
item.description:
1. What about the so called "Alpha Generation" that's coming
2. Yeah, I heard it's not that bad these days... STILL NO
3. How old are you?
4
5. Embrace PDFism
6
7. Have you effing noticed this? Has happened many times to me at this point
8
9. How Third War ended?
10. Hard to argue with that point HUE HUE
11. I would litterally date them instead of Sidney Sweeny
12
13
14. I've actually never met one in the wild
15. IT'S HARD, OKAYYY?! Thank you if you made this far in the dump. Let me share with you that as well as posting on Imgur, I'm also working on a game of my own. A passion project, if you will. It's a "Stanley Parable" inspired first person narrative game. If you like the humor of this dump, you might actually like the game to (at least what my friend on Discord tells me, that one friend). Anyway please wishlist it helps small game devs like me: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have a great Sunday
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames
